name: Azar Lawrence
abstract: Azar Lawrence (born November 3, 1952) is an American jazz saxophonist, known for his contributions as sideman to McCoy Tyner, Miles Davis, Freddie Hubbard, and Woody Shaw.

concerts.label: New Audiences Jazz Anthology Series: Miles Davis
Newport Jazz Festival: Wild Magnolias, Freddie Hubbard Quintet, and McCoy Tyner Quintet
McCoy Tyner Quintet and Rahsaan Roland Kirk
Frédéric Chopin's 200th Birthday Party - A Polish Jazz Celebration
concerts.venue: Isaac Stern Auditorium / Ronald O. Perelman Stage

about_quotes.speaker: Tyner McCoy
about_quotes.evidence: [INTERVIEWER] So with Sahara you get some national, critical recognition. You get a Grammy nomination, Azar Lawrence is in the group...
about_quotes.doc_title: Tyner McCoy — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.speaker: Dave Liebman
about_quotes.evidence: Azar comes out and cannot – doesn’t know what to do. Miles goes like this – give him my horn... I said, no way. I was pissed off.
about_quotes.doc_title: Dave Liebman — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
